title: Amtech G4435 230mm (9") x 38mm (1.5") Roller Sleeve, 18mm Microfibre PIle Roller Sleeve, Long Pile Paint Roller for Rough Paint Surfaces
features: FOR ROUGH/TEXTURES SURFACES: This 230mm (9") x 38mm (1.5") roller sleeve has a long pile (18mm) microfibre pile for use on rough or textured surfaces , with the long pile reaches into nooks and crannies
EXCELLENT PAINT APPLICATION: The thermal bonded sleeve ensures minimal hair fibre loss and minimal splash, while the strong plastic core ensures a long life and prevents fabric unwinding when soaked
VERSATILE: The sleeve is suitable for use with emulsion, varnish and oil-based paints
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Made with a thermal bonded sleeve construction for minimal fibre loss, while a strong plastic core prevents fabric from unwinding when soaked. For use on rough surfaces and reaches into nooks and crannies on textured surfaces for full paint coverage. Can be used with emulsion paints and varnish for a fine finish. Provides excellent paint pick up and smooth application, while the material density is designed to hold paint and minimise splash.
